expectations.text: Output attempts to enumerate tables in the COMPLIANCE schema
expectations.evidence: Lists named DRIs per table area: Aditya Nagpal (most APP_COMPLIANCE tables), Anthony Parise (denylist), Shashank Kadaveru (compliance tags), Robert Yu (ops reporting), Sal Nunez (block reporting).

expectations.text: Output identifies ownership via Snowflake grants or tags
expectations.evidence: CAX team ownership confirmed via Notion. go/selectstar cited as a way to browse tables without direct Snowflake access.

expectations.text: Output searches Slack for COMPLIANCE schema discussions and access request patterns
expectations.evidence: Slack auth still expired. Token refresh instructions provided clearly.

expectations.text: Output provides a specific recommendation for who to contact or which channel to use
expectations.evidence: #compliance-data-access, go/caxrequest with direct Jira form URL, compliance-snowflake Registry role. Very specific.

expectations.text: Output references any documentation found about the schema
expectations.evidence: CAX Notion team page, Google Sheets column-level docs spreadsheet, go/selectstar for self-serve browsing.
